subject: [RFC PATCH v4 10/27] mm/swap: add free_folio callback for folio release cleanup

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Identified a need for cleanup before returning pages to the buddy allocator when their reference count reaches zero. Proposed adding a new callback, `free_folio`, to handle this operation.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This RFC patch proposes adding a new callback, `free_folio`, to the Linux kernel's memory management system. The callback is intended for use by managed-memory services when a folio's reference count reaches zero. It allows these services to perform cleanup operations before returning the page to the buddy allocator.
